INGREDIENTS:
<ul>
<li>gin (1 oz)</li>
<li>Campari (1 oz)</li>
<li>sweet vermouth (1 oz)</li>
<li>large ice cube (1)</li>
<li>orange peel</li>
</ul>

INSTRUCTIONS:
<ol>
<li>Add <span class="ingredient">gin</span>, <span class="ingredient">Campari</span>, and <span class="ingredient">sweet vermouth</span> to a <span class="cookware">mixing</span> glass with ice.</li>
<li>Stir for <span class="timer">30 seconds</span> until well chilled and properly diluted.</li>
<li>Strain into a <span class="cookware">rocks</span> glass over <span class="ingredient">large ice cube</span>.</li>
<li>Express the oils from an <span class="ingredient">orange peel</span> over the drink by holding it over the glass and giving it a good twist. Rub the peel around the rim of the glass, then drop it in.</li>
</ol>
